observations.summary: Dan chooses to seek the light and truth above, rejecting the burdens of the flesh and the comforting lies of the earth's tribute, representing a tension between spiritual aspiration and earthly attachment.

left_evidence.quote: I seek the light. I seek the truth that is above, not the lie that is below. I will not be pulled down by the burdens of the flesh, nor the comforting lies of the earth’s tribute!

right_evidence.quote: the booming wrath of Lady astarte

bridge_evidence.quote: a seismic, chilling shriek tore through the air from the well—the sound of ancient power denied, of cosmic rage unleashed
